channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole getting bigger and deeper outside infant/junior school, 12th March
item.description:
I've watched this road surface get progressively worse over the past 4 months. It happens every 2/3 years - it's not going to get any better. It will, obviously, get worse and yet I've just received an email saying it doesn't warrant further investigation. It's directly outside a school. (My original report FixMyStreet ref: 8545842)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faraday Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 12th March
item.description:
Other litter/Dog Faeces/Tissues Lat/Long - 51.4037198, -0.0354884 what3words - rocks.head.ballots Nearest address - 336 Croydon Road, Beckenham, BR3 4HR

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Paving Slabs, 12th March
item.description:
Multiple uneven and broken paving slabs. Please address immediately.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Chester Gate, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 11 the avenue, 12th March
item.description:
Black bags dumped by tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Outside number 27, 12th March
item.description:
Coal vault chute has become loose and now moves - trip / injury hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Jeffrey's Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter near lavender pond fence, on the pavement, 12th March
item.description:
The litter on this stretch of the pavement seems to have been adding uo this week. Some of this litter has been here since monday and it seems to be attracting more. Please, may the litter be picked up daily on this part of the salter road pavement, near lavender pond nature reserve? Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unauthorised dumping of furniture, 12th March
item.description:
Unauthorised dumping of furniture left outside shop.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: MASSIVE pothole, couldn't stop to measure, 12th March
item.description:
This pothole has been there for a very long time and is getting worse by the day. My husband drove over it late on Monday night and didn't know it was there and was really worried there could be damage to his car. It's getting more and more difficult to avoid as is getting so much larger and impossible to go around as the speed bump is adjacent to a bollard. THIS NEEDS ADDRESSING EXTREMELY URGENTLY.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of Gravel on the street, 12th March
item.description:
Pile of Gravel on the street, taking place of 2 cars, with out a council licence and making dirt and takes away a paid parking
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting, 12th March
item.description:
Green in middle of Penhurst Green requires cutting. Please can this be looked into.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penshurst Green, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working, 12th March
item.description:
The street light between the bus stop between Cumberland road and 58 Westmorland has not been light for months now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of dog poo in area, 12th March
item.description:
Dog poo frequently being left all round area. Have left photos of most recent deposits.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trenholme Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Picardy Manorway by bus stop Eastern Way Norman Way, 12th March
item.description:
There is a large amount of rubbish by the bus stop on the grass area that still has not been cleared. This was previously raised under ref 8956445
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Manorway, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electrical items fly tipped by Council Workers, 12th March
item.description:
Electrical items dumped next to recycling bins; also 2 x silver metal bins filled full of cardboard and other rubbish from electrical work by Council Workers. On Wednesday, 11/03/26 two council workers arrived with their van and cleaned the van out. Dumping any waste. Why can't they use their own Council rubbish area? Also, some of the electrical waste needs proper disposal.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Wilson Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet stuff dumped, 12th March
item.description:
Test more effing fly tipping down this road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping remove the tent from Aden Grove please N16 9NL. It is behind the little block in the car park., 12th March
item.description:
Fly Tipping remove the tent from Aden Grove please N16 9NL. It is behind the little block in the car park.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous fly tipping next to this house, 12th March
item.description:
There is continuously fly tipping next to this house Unfortunately, we live close to this area and it is a continuous I saw every time we leave our house this is a residential area and it’s just not acceptable. Please could we have a sign put in this area to say it is beening monitored for flight tipping this might help the situation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 12th March
item.description:
Street light out please attend and check
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Pleasant Walk, Coldblow, Greater London

item.description:
